description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling, low-profile layout and a dark, multi-faceted hip roof. The front features a wide entrance with a covered porch, flanked by manicured lawns and a stepped pathway leading to the main door. The rear of the property includes a large backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, outdoor seating area, and mature trees providing shade. The property is enclosed by a combination of brick and wooden fencing, offering privacy and a sense of enclosure. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the front and rear facades, with large glass doors opening to the backyard. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of dark roofing shingles, painted wood or composite siding, and glass, with landscaping elements integrated throughout.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, wide front porch, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and outdoor seating. The property is enclosed by fencing and surrounded by greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide porch, manicured lawns, and stepped pathway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, sloped roof, and partial view of the backyard and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and large windows/doors opening to the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the roof's slope, pool, and additional landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large rear glass doors
